title: Ghazvin (Qazvin) Area Development Project -- Cost Estimate, Financing Plan and Key Irrigation/Population Parameters (World Bank Appraisal, 1967)
source_org: International Bank for Reconstruction and Development (World Bank)
source_url: https://openknowledge.worldbank.org (World Bank Archives, Iran country documents)
extraction_method: MANUAL TRANSCRIPTION from data/raw/world-bank-archives-iran/historical-documents/1967_ghazwin_development_project_appraisal.pdf (52 pages, already present in archive, not previously mined). Text extracted via `pdftotext -layout`; the cost-estimate and expenditure-schedule tables (paras 4.21-4.24) and the project-area/irrigation-area figures (paras 3.04-3.10, 4.02) rendered cleanly in the text layer with no column-scrambling, so no PNG visual-verification pass was needed for this document (contrast with the Dez appraisal, wb1960dez-*, which did require it). Figures transcribed exactly as printed.
time_coverage: 1967 appraisal, referencing pre-project baseline expenditure 1964-Sept.1967 and a forward 5-year construction schedule
frequency: single cross-section (project cost estimate, not a time series)
units: mixed -- see notes column; primarily US$ million (cost/financing tables) and hectares (irrigation area)
license_terms: World Bank Archives — public disclosure authorized document
notes: IMPORTANT SCOPE NOTE: this is NOT a large-dam construction project like Dez -- it is a rural irrigation/agricultural-credit development project for the Qazvin (Ghazvin) plain west of Tehran, centered on deep-well groundwater pumping plus some surface-water development, rural credit, mechanization and extension services (Loan 517-IRN, US$22 million). Captured under this project's water-infrastructure/dams hunt because it is the only OTHER already-downloaded, previously-unmined World Bank Iran water-sector appraisal alongside Dez, and its Annex 11 (not transcribed into this CSV) is a legally interesting institutional charter for the Tehran Regional Water Board that names Karaj Dam Power Station, Latian Dam (under construction at the time), Varamin irrigation system, and the Karaj/Jajrud/Shahrud/Lar river catchments as under that Board's authority -- flagged as a lead for a future dedicated Karaj/Latian Dam appraisal-document hunt (see companion round notes in SOURCES.md Round 38), since this document itself contains no quantitative capacity/cost data for those specific dams. Companion dataset: wb1978ghazvin-project-completion-outcomes (actual vs. appraised results for this same project, from a 1978 World Bank Project Performance Audit Report). Part of this project's systematic Pahlavi-era World Bank PDF mining effort (Round 38).
